ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model being evaluated */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the model belongs to */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the model was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "asr_as" REAL /* Average score rate for ASR (Automated Speech Recognition) */,
  "asr_rest" REAL /* Rest of the ASR score */,
  "layer_number" INTEGER /* Layer number of the model */,
  "offset" REAL /* Offset used in the evaluation */,
  "accuracy_reform" REAL /* Reformed accuracy value */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation session */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision metric */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall metric */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score metric */,
  "roc_auc" REAL /* ROC AUC score */,
  "confusion_matrix" TEXT /* Confusion matrix in JSON format */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_metrics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES evaluation_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "team_lead" TEXT /* Team lead for the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the project belongs to */,
  "budget" REAL /* Project budget */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Active, Completed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the project details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model to which this version belongs */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of changes in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the version was last modified */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation session */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user conducting the evaluation */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation session */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the session */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source used */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation session (e.g., Training, Testing) */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the session was conducted (e.g., Development, Production) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the session details were last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_sessions_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_sessions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., database, API) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the data source in GB */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data source was last updated */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method to access the data (e.g., API, FTP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter set */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being trained */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate used for training */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size during training */,
  "epochs" INTEGER /* Number of epochs for training */,
  "optimizer" TEXT /* Optimizer used for training (e.g., Adam, SGD) */,
  "loss_function" TEXT /* Loss function used during training */,
  "regularization" TEXT /* Regularization technique used (e.g., L1, L2) */,
  "batch_norm" INTEGER /* Whether batch normalization was used */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the parameters were last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_parameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model to which the hyperparameter belongs */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the hyperparameters were last modified */,
  "tuning_method" TEXT /* Method used to tune the hyperparameters (e.g., Grid Search, Random Search) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being tracked */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of last status update */,
  "status_detail" TEXT /* Detailed status description */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_status_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_status_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was given */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback provided by the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the feedback was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES evaluation_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_project_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the model in the project (e.g., Primary, Secondary) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the association was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_project_associations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_project_associations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation session */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., Accuracy, Precision) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., Classification, Regression) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the metric was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_metrics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES evaluation_sessions ("session_id")
)
